title: TNT in a barrel
description: This resource pack changes the TNT texture and it looks like the barrel.
body:
This explosive themed resource pack changes the TNT texture and it looks like the barrel. Have you seen those movies where they have explosive barrels? Well this resource pack is perfect for you! This could look good in a pirate ship in the seas or maybe it would go in the mines! It's up to you what you want to do with it! Whether you're a seasoned miner, a creative builder, or a daring adventurer, this resource pack adds a layer of refinement to the chaos that ensues when you decide to ignite your creations. Have fun the TNT barrels. I can't wait to see what you will do with this!

Discord Contact: Shark10199
